title: MikroTik D53G-5HacD2HnD-TC&EG120K-EA, Chateau LTE12 (2025)
description: Mikrotik introduces the new Chateau LTE12 (2025) with an upgraded LTE modem. The Chateau LTE12 (2025) is a dual-band home WiFi router with 5x Gigabit LAN ports and a category 12 LTE modem, including a USB port. The modulation speed of the 2.4GHz reaches up to 300Mbps , while the 5GHz band supports up to 866Mbps The Chateau features four built-in WiFi antennas and two connectors for external LTE antennas (antennas are not included in the package) With the Chateau LTE12 kit, you are no longer restricted by cabling â CAT12 LTE provides speeds of up to 600 Mbps for download and up to 150 Mbps for upload with low latency. LTE CAT12 enables devices to use three bands simultaneously , which is beneficial in areas with high LTE traffic or weak signal strength Device Power adapter 24V / 1.5A Patch cable
